settings.title: praatMaar — Settings
settings.mode.toggle: Toggle: press to start and stop
settings.hotkey.modifiers_only: Hotkey ignored: add at least one regular key (e.g. Space or a letter).
settings.auto_paste: Automatically paste (only when no destination is active)
settings.warm_microphone: Keep microphone warm (faster start, mic stays open)
settings.model_restart_note: Note: the new model only works after restart.
recovery.busy: A recording or transcription is already running. Try again later.
recovery.invalid_file: Not a valid recovery audio file.
already_running: praatMaar is already running; this second start was stopped.
model.load_failed: The Whisper model could not be loaded.
mic.warm: Microphone warm — recording starts without delay.
mic.warm_failed: Microphone warmup failed (recording will retry later): {error}
splash.model_failed: The model could not be loaded.
dictation.busy: A previous recording is still being processed.
rec.busy: A previous recording is still being processed.
rec.start_failed_intro: praatMaar could not start recording. Dictation needs a working microphone.
rec.mic_none: No microphone or other recording device was found on this computer.
rec.mic_default_unavailable: The default microphone is not available yet — often after Bluetooth connect/disconnect. Try selecting a microphone in Settings.
rec.mic_invalid: The selected microphone device is invalid or no longer connected.
rec.mic_permission: praatMaar does not have permission to use the microphone.
rec.mic_generic: The microphone could not be opened.
rec.check_privacy_win: - Microphone access for apps (Windows: Settings > Privacy & security > Microphone).
rec.check_privacy_mac: - Microphone access for praatMaar (System Settings > Privacy & Security > Microphone).
rec.check_default: - That a microphone is connected and set as an input device.
rec.check_settings: - That the correct microphone is selected in praatMaar > Settings.
rec.check_cable: - That a headset/Bluetooth mic is connected, powered, and not disabled.
rec.check_restart: - Whether dictating again helps after the headset is fully connected (praatMaar refreshes devices on the next recording).
rec.stop_hint: Stop with the hotkey or Esc.
rec.too_short: Recording was too short and will not be processed.
rec.cancelled_detail: Nothing will be transcribed or pasted.
rec.saved_only: Saved only (no clipboard/paste for this destination).
rec.pasted: Text was pasted into the active field.
rec.still_clipboard: Text is still on the clipboard.
rec.recovery_preserve_warn: Warning: audio could not be kept for recovery: {error}
rec.temp_delete_warn: Warning: temporary audio file could not be deleted: {error}
rec.device_invalid: Microphone device {device} is invalid ({error}); falling back to Windows default.
rec.device_no_input: Device {device} ({name}) has no microphone input; falling back to Windows default.
destinations.title: praatMaar — Destinations
destinations.name: Name
destinations.column.name: Name
destinations.error.reserved_name: This name is reserved for the voice command "standaard".
destinations.error.name_collision: This name collides with "{existing}" (same voice command).
destinations.error.select_first: Select a destination in the list first.
modules.title: praatMaar — Modules
modules.intro: Enable or disable extensions. All dictation cycle events are also written to the event journal (events/events.jsonl) for external tools.
modules.incremental: Incremental transcription during recording (interim partial events)
modules.inbox_mirror.name: Inbox mirror
modules.inbox_mirror.description: Copies each saved transcript to the inbox folder for external processing.
help.title: praatMaar — Help
help.fallback: Help is temporarily unavailable. Open Destinations from the system tray to manage destinations, or see docs/user/ in the project.
